title: Rename device - Rename, emojis not allowed
scenario: Verify that emojis are not allowed in the device name field, with the "Done" button disabled and the name unchanged on the Home screen.
steps: Tap on the device name field to edit it.
Enter an emoji (e.g., 😊) into the device name field.
Observe the state of the 'Done' button.
Attempt to save or confirm the change.
Return to the Home screen and check the displayed device name.
expected: The "Done" button should be disabled when an emoji is entered. The device name should not be changed. On the Home screen, the device name should remain unchanged.
